project.description:
Public documentation content for the Homing framework — the home for release notes authored as in-studio docs, going forward. Existing release docs (0.5.0 and earlier) remain in homing-self-studio; from 0.5.1 on, the canonical, public release docs live here as RigidDoc / ComposedDoc records and are mounted into the demo studio.
Content only: a library of Doc records. The catalogue that mounts them into a studio tree lives alongside the studio it hangs under (e.g. the demo's ReleasesCatalogue under MultiStudioHome) — this module stays a leaf the studios depend on, never the reverse.
